steps.title: Fit the original line
steps.content: Read the $y$-intercept of the line of best fit for data set A from the graph. It is about $53.75$.

steps.title: Use the vertical-shift shortcut
steps.content: Data set B subtracts $11$ from every $y$-value. That moves the entire line of best fit down $11$ units. The slope stays the same, and the $y$-intercept is reduced by $11$.

steps.title: Subtract from the intercept
steps.content: The original intercept is about $53.75$, so the new intercept is $53.75-11=42.75$. That matches choice C.
